contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 5
- Description: @⁨Kirsten Ritschel⁩ I was thinking through our conversation yesterday and was wondering if you would be open to having the freight deliver directly to your doorsteps similar to the pallet you received earlier this year for the cacao from another supplier for yourself and the rest of the chocolate making community in San Francisco 
  
  Thereafter have @⁨Val Lapidus⁩ pop by to pickup the following from you 
  
  - bulk bags of cacao nibs 
  
  - ⁠bulk bags of cacao tea 
  
  - ⁠bulk bags of cacao almonds 
  
  This way it will help save a trip to the San Francisco airport to pickup the freight when it arrives by plane. 
  
  Let me know your thoughts 😊🙏
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 8.33
- Attached Filename: None
- Destination Contribution File Location: No file attached
